label: New
items: Plant Lens is now the first tile on your quick-access menu — open it with a camera tap to identify a plant, diagnose problems and get care tasks. This is the renamed and refreshed Plant Doctor; everything you could do there before is still here, with a clearer name and a camera icon that matches what the tool actually does.

label: Improved
items: The Capture quick link now opens your full Journal with the Add Entry sheet already up, instead of a separate stripped-down capture page — same one-tap snap, but you get the proper journal alongside it.

label: Removed
items: The standalone mobile Lens screen (`/quick/lens`) and the standalone Quick Capture page (`/quick/journal`) have been retired — both have been folded into their full-screen versions accessible from the same quick-link tiles.
